scripts.check: ultracite check && bun run typecheck && vitest run

ATTACHMENTS.description: R2 bucket for Zotero stored-file attachments and legacy md5/filename storage objects.

DB.description: D1 database for Zotero metadata, sync versions, API keys, groups, settings, full-text index state, and file metadata.

RAW_FILE_URL_SECRET.description: Optional secret used to sign raw file-view URLs. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

ROOT_PASSWORD.description: Admin password for compatibility setup/admin routes. Generate a unique random value; do not reuse your Zotero.org password.

ROOT_USERNAME.description: Admin username for compatibility setup/admin routes. `root` is fine for single-owner deployments when paired with a strong password.

SELFHOST_TEST_API_KEY.description: Initial API key used by the compatibility harness and disposable Zotero Desktop smoke. Generate a unique random value.

TTS_TEST_KEY.description: Optional key for exercising the TTS compatibility stub. Leave blank unless you intentionally run the TTS tests.
